title: Treasurers and Controllers
description: Direct financial activities, such as planning, procurement, and investments for all or part of an organization.

tasks.text: Evaluate needs for procurement of funds and investment of surpluses and make appropriate recommendations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Delegate authority for the receipt, disbursement, banking, protection, and custody of funds, securities, and financial instruments.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop and maintain relationships with banking, insurance, and external accounting personnel to facilitate financial activities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Monitor financial activities and details, such as cash flow and reserve levels, to ensure that all legal and regulatory requirements are met.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Receive, record, and authorize requests for disbursements in accordance with company policies and procedures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop internal control policies, guidelines, and procedures for activities, such as budget administration, cash and credit management, and accounting.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Coordinate and direct the financial planning, budgeting, procurement, or investment activities of all or part of an organization.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Receive cash and checks and make deposits.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare or direct preparation of financial statements, business activity reports, financial position forecasts, annual budgets, or reports required by regulatory agencies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Monitor and evaluate the performance of accounting and other financial staff, recommending and implementing personnel actions, such as promotions and dismissals.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Analyze the financial details of past, present, and expected operations to identify development opportunities and areas where improvement is needed.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct or coordinate audits of company accounts and financial transactions to ensure compliance with state and federal requirements and statutes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Advise management on short-term and long-term financial objectives, policies, and actions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Maintain current knowledge of organizational policies and procedures, federal and state policies and directives, and current accounting standards.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide direction and assistance to other organizational units regarding accounting and budgeting policies and procedures and efficient control and utilization of financial resources.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Lead staff training and development in budgeting and financial management areas.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare and file annual tax returns or prepare financial information so that outside accountants can complete tax returns.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Supervise employees performing financial reporting, accounting, billing, collections, payroll, and budgeting duties.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform tax planning work.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Compute, withhold, and account for all payroll deductions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Handle all aspects of employee insurance, benefits, and casualty programs, including monitoring changes in health insurance regulations and creating budgets for benefits and worker's compensation.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Determine depreciation rates to apply to capitalized items and advise management on actions regarding the purchase, lease, or disposal of such items.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
